caption: A woman with blonde curly hair tied up in a bun wears black headphones and a black t-shirt with a white circular logo on the chest. She is positioned in a studio setting, facing slightly to her right and smiling while looking off-camera. A professional microphone with a black pop filter is positioned in front of her. In the background, a screen displays the name "Johnson" in red text, and a yellow vertical stripe runs down the wall behind her. On-screen graphics include the "BOSS TALK 101" logo and a "PODCAST" icon with a microphone symbol. The scene remains static across the sequence, with the woman maintaining her position and expression, showing minimal movement as she listens or prepares to speak.
